message.content:
You are a senior code reviewer. Review the following changes to the memorytree-workflow project for correctness, logic errors, and edge cases.

Please read these files first:
- d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/build.ts (lines 55-90, 252-320, 430-445)
- d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts (lines 129-150, 176-210)
- d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/report/render/links.ts
- d:/demo1/memorytree-workflow/src/types/report.ts

The changes made:
1. `BuildReportOptions` got `extraManifestDirs?: string[]`
2. `buildReport` merges manifests from extra dirs alongside own project
3. `parseCleanMarkdownMessages` and `resolveRawPath` in build.ts now fall back to global_* absolute paths when repo-relative path doesn't resolve to an existing file
4. `resolveCleanPath` in links.ts same fix
5. `heartbeat.ts`: computes extra manifest dirs from all OTHER registered projects and passes them into processProject/buildReport

Report any bugs, edge cases, or issues. Be specific.
